items.name: 'Hammer' Canis Helmet Mold A
items.description: Developed by Olcom, the Canis line of helmets were designed as part of their 'contractor special' line and personally overseen by Keystone, Olcoms' default to private security. items.name: Nuclear Winter Masked Man Helmet
items.description: Forged in the fire of pre-war industries, this bulky helmet once shielded mech operators from both shrapnel and the piercing glare of nuclear dawn. Its dome-like LED visor gleams faintly, a ghostly eye watching over the desolation. The faded skull paint, worn by time and sorrow, hints at a legacy of forgotten warriors, their burden carried forward by those who dare to tread the wasteland

items.name: OV-1B "Auxiliary" Helmet
items.description:
Potentially one of the most impactful iterations of OV-1, this armor set in particular has been adopted by a multitude of medical teams, and combat medics around the globe for it's reliability, and effectiveness in being able to evacuate patients while under fire. It features an advanced surgical kit, and other life saving equipment.
